sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n111440" key="filoptwxi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φῐλο-πτωχία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n111440.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">love for the poor,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">15.34</biblScope> </bibl> [<itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">χῑ</itype>, Arethas].</sense> </entryFree>
